name: @retrostrap/retrospace
description: The curated retrostrap directory (docs/12). Reads are static (sites.json) + client-side; writes are a Lambda, submissions open a GitHub issue, the toplist counters live on the shared DynamoDB table (infra/README.md).
comment: The tested core (publish/verify/moderation/search/toplist/sites/classify/hit-store) is pure and dependency-free. The AWS SDK is only the deploy-time binding (ops-dynamo.js, sync-handler.js, and the counter/export handlers); it ships in the Lambda Node runtime. GitHub submissions use the built-in fetch.
